site.title: TestYourFriends — Discover how your friends think
site.description: Quizzes with real dilemmas that reveal each person's life philosophy. Share, compare and understand your friends like never before.
site.keywords: personality quiz, ethical dilemmas, friend test, compare life philosophy, group quiz

home.title: Home
home.description: Discover how the people you care about think with real dilemma quizzes. Share, compare and understand your friends.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Access your TestYourFriends account to create sessions and share quizzes with your friends.

register.title: Sign up
register.description: Create your TestYourFriends account and start discovering how your friends think.

dashboard.title: Create session
dashboard.description: Manage your sessions, review results and create new quizzes to share with your friends.

newSession.title: Create new session
newSession.description: Choose a quiz and create a group session to share with your friends.

ethicsQuiz.title: Ethical Dilemmas Quiz
ethicsQuiz.description: 10 ethical situations that will reveal your life philosophy. Discover which historical figure thinks like you.

virtualQuiz.title: Reality or Virtuality Quiz
virtualQuiz.description: 10 scenarios where virtual reality offers tempting alternatives. Where is your tipping point?

joinSession.title: Join session
joinSession.description: Join a group session and take the quiz with your friends.

results.title: Results
results.description: Discover your personality profile based on your quiz answers.

groupResults.title: Group results
groupResults.description: Compare the results of all session participants.

hero.title: Discover how the people you care about think
hero.subtitle: Quizzes with real dilemmas that reveal each person's life philosophy. Share, compare and understand your friends like never before.

howItWorks.title: Not an individual quiz. A conversation.
howItWorks.subtitle: The fun is in the comparison. Does your best friend think like you? Will your partner surprise you? There's only one way to find out.

1.label: Pick a quiz
1.description: 32 quizzes about personality, relationships, morality and pop culture. There's one for every conversation you want to have.

2.label: Create your session
2.description: One click generates a unique link for your group. No registration required for participants.

3.label: Send it anywhere
3.description: WhatsApp, Instagram, Telegram, wherever. Each person answers alone, without seeing others' responses.

4.label: Compare results
4.description: Find out who thinks alike, who's the most extreme in the group, and who will surprise everyone.

howItWorks.note: Free. No downloads. Works on any phone.

features.title: More than a quiz: a way to understand each other

dilemmas.title: Dilemmas that reveal
dilemmas.description: Questions designed to discover how you really think when facing complex situations.

share.title: Share and compare
share.description: Send the quiz to your friends and discover who thinks like you and who will surprise you.

profile.title: Personality profile
profile.description: Get a profile based on ethical dimensions and discover which historical figure shares your philosophy.

quizzes.title: Our quizzes
quizzes.subtitle: Choose a quiz to try alone or create a group session with your friends.
